name: Bakery Magnate: Beginning
short_description: Bakery Magnate is a game with a small plot in which you have to solve economic problems to keep the store afloat. At the same time, you intend to provide for your son, who constantly gets into trouble.
detailed_description:
YOU MAY BE INTERESTED


About the Game

Bakery Magnate is a game with a small plot in which you have to solve economic problems to keep the store afloat. At the same time, you intend to provide for your son, who constantly gets into trouble.

Features:
- Beautiful, stylized graphics, pleasant atmosphere.
- Mysterious plot.
- A wide range of products.
- Advanced trading system.
- A variety of customer replicas.
- Free game mode.
- Pleasant sound.
- Support for multiple languages.

The game teaches life values.
